title: Shrimp and Garlic Paella
description: A classic Spanish dish with succulent shrimp, garlic, and saffron-infused rice. Perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced chorizo and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the diced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced tomato and cook until the liquid has evaporated, about 5 minutes.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Add the garlic and saffron threads, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Spanish rice and stir to combine with the vegetable mixture.
Cook the rice for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with lemon wedges, if desired.
